note: Derived index of what the ingested sources declare — typed in the Vela EdgeKind vocabulary with a trust tier per edge. Not signed state: the signed spine is .vela/ + frontier.json.

nodes.label: Kneser's theorem
nodes.description: Lower bound for the size of a sumset.

nodes.label: Golod–Shafarevich inequality
nodes.description: Rank-of-relations bound for finitely presented groups/algebras.

nodes.label: Linnik's theorem
nodes.description: Least prime in an arithmetic progression.

nodes.label: Maynard–Tao theorem
nodes.description: Consecutive primes in arithmetic progressions (bounded gaps).

nodes.label: native_decide (trusted native evaluation)
nodes.description: The proof trusts a native-compiled computation, not a kernel proof.

nodes.label: Shiu's theorem
nodes.description: Strings of consecutive primes in a progression.

nodes.label: Tao–Teräväinen theorem
nodes.description: Bound on the number of prime factors of nearby integers.

nodes.label: wiki: Solution to one part of problem;  incorrect solution to other part
wiki: Proof found (Lean), which is a specific case of Pommerenke
wiki: New proof of (slightly weaker) partial result (Lean)
wiki: Slight improvement to past construction
wiki: Candidate partial result (solution to second part)
wiki: Formalization
ai_systems: ulam.ai scaffold with Gemini 3 Flash and Gemini 3.1 Pro
